name: postcondition-property-update
description: Verify postconditions update NPC properties atomically and clamp values to [0, 1]
preconditions: 2 NPCs with initial properties: NPC1 wealth=0.9 hunger=0.1, NPC2 fatigue=0.95 anger=0.0
expectedOutcome: Postconditions applied atomically, values clamped to [0, 1]

steps.comment: First node arrival, postconditions may apply
Time passes, more activities trigger postconditions
Second node arrival, verify property updates and clamping
